records.m_Talk_ENG: Ta-da! What do you think?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ta-da! What do you think?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ta-da! What do you think?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, you'll be able to use this just like a real body.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, you'll be able to use this just like a real body.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, you'll be able to use this just like a real body.

records.m_Talk_ENG:

8vA mass-enabled hologram. Quite the impressive tech.
records.m_Talk_DEU:

8vA mass-enabled hologram. Quite the impressive tech.
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8vA mass-enabled hologram. Quite the impressive tech.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Even my senses
8v It feels like I've returned to the days when my body was still alive.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Even my senses
8v It feels like I've returned to the days when my body was still alive.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Even my senses
8v It feels like I've returned to the days when my body was still alive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you, Terrabrain girl.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you, Terrabrain girl.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you, Terrabrain girl.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No big deal. You're a friend of Daddy's, after all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No big deal. You're a friend of Daddy's, after all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No big deal. You're a friend of Daddy's, after all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry we couldn't let you rest, Seosaeng.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry we couldn't let you rest, Seosaeng.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry we couldn't let you rest, Seosaeng.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And thank you for agreeing to work with the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And thank you for agreeing to work with the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And thank you for agreeing to work with the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My personal wish was fulfilled long ago. Now, I return solely to fulfill my duty as a member of the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My personal wish was fulfilled long ago. Now, I return solely to fulfill my duty as a member of the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My personal wish was fulfilled long ago. Now, I return solely to fulfill my duty as a member of the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Just being able to do something again
8v is more than I deserve.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Just being able to do something again
8v is more than I deserve.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Just being able to do something again
8v is more than I deserve.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Many things have happened over the years, enough to change even the mountains and rivers.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Many things have happened over the years, enough to change even the mountains and rivers.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Many things have happened over the years, enough to change even the mountains and rivers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was the course you set in motion that led us all here that day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was the course you set in motion that led us all here that day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was the course you set in motion that led us all here that day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That child. He reminds me so much of her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That child. He reminds me so much of her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That child. He reminds me so much of her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: He's done well. Broke the curse of the Dragon Blood with his own hands.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He's done well. Broke the curse of the Dragon Blood with his own hands.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He's done well. Broke the curse of the Dragon Blood with his own hands.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Funny, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Funny, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Funny, isn't it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who would've thought the future Commander Myeongdal never got to see was so close.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who would've thought the future Commander Myeongdal never got to see was so close.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who would've thought the future Commander Myeongdal never got to see was so close.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
And even after such a miracle
8v we still have no shortage of trials ahead.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
And even after such a miracle
8v we still have no shortage of trials ahead.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
And even after such a miracle
8v we still have no shortage of trials ahead.

records.m_Talk_ENG:

8vThe Qliphoth Game.
records.m_Talk_DEU:

8vThe Qliphoth Game.
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8vThe Qliphoth Game.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As for that, I understood it through the data compiled in the Terrabrain. We also know that a dangerous entity will soon break into the Normalside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As for that, I understood it through the data compiled in the Terrabrain. We also know that a dangerous entity will soon break into the Normalside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As for that, I understood it through the data compiled in the Terrabrain. We also know that a dangerous entity will soon break into the Normalside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So please, tell me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So please, tell me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So please, tell me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What can I do to protect the children's future?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What can I do to protect the children's future?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What can I do to protect the children's future?
